final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand promotional poster for RAN QIU with a warm autumnal, poetic, and serene visual experience.

Style/medium: needs an 东方美学 minimalist aesthetic with 自然诗意 and 温暖治愈 qualities — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space with shallow depth-of-field framing — exact layout is yours
Subject: must include the RAN QIU brand identity as focal element, integrated with natural autumnal elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact natural setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a 金色时光 (golden hour) warm and tranquil atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use #8B3A1E (深秋棕红), #E8DCCB (米色), #D4A574 (金棕色) as the dominant palette
Materials/textures: needs a warm, organic surface treatment evoking natural materials — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve brand color palette; generous white space must be visible
Avoid:
